patterns.name: Versioned Checkpoints
patterns.description: create_checkpoint() with versioned channel values and versions_seen for deterministic state recovery

patterns.name: Durable Execution
patterns.description: Graph-based stateful workflows that survive interruptions and resume from exact state

patterns.name: Graph-Based Workflow
patterns.description: Nodes and edges define execution flow with conditional branching and cycles

patterns.name: Fleet Coordination with Worktrees
patterns.description: Each agent gets its own git worktree, branch, and PR for parallel isolated work

patterns.name: Task Decomposition with Lineage
patterns.description: Hierarchical TaskNode with lineage context for bounded subtask delegation

patterns.name: Recovery Manager
patterns.description: Scans sessions, validates state, executes recovery actions (recover/cleanup/escalate/skip)

patterns.name: Workflow Engine
patterns.description: Declarative multi-step workflows with andThen/andWorkflow composition

patterns.name: Suspend/Resume Controller
patterns.description: Workflow checkpoint data with suspend/resume capabilities

patterns.name: Task-Based Orchestration
patterns.description: Role-based agents with sequential/hierarchical process execution

patterns.name: Async Task Execution
patterns.description: Support for async_execution flag with event-driven task completion

patterns.name: Approval Modes (allow/ask/deny)
patterns.description: PermissionManager with allow/ask/deny decisions, rule parsing, shell-semantics-aware matching

patterns.name: Subagent Delegation
patterns.description: Explicit task delegation through subagents with separate context and tool access

patterns.name: Skill System
patterns.description: Visible skills with explicit invocation and slash-command distinction

patterns.name: Plan/Build Split
patterns.description: Separate plan and build modes with clear mental model for primary agents vs subagents

patterns.name: Permission Engine
patterns.description: Channel-based grant/deny with session auto-approve and config layering

patterns.name: Session Management
patterns.description: Session creation with parentSessionID tracking for task lineage

patterns.name: Append-Only Event System
patterns.description: Event base class with monotonically increasing IDs, source attribution, causal linking

patterns.name: Event Store
patterns.description: EventStoreABC with search_events, filtering, and durable persistence

patterns.name: Workspace Abstraction
patterns.description: Local/remote execution symmetry with workspace isolation

patterns.name: Repair Loop
patterns.description: Lint edited files, auto-commit lint fixes, ask to fix lint errors, then run tests and ask to fix test errors

patterns.name: Repo Map with PageRank
patterns.description: Tree-sitter-based tag extraction with PageRank scoring for context relevance

patterns.name: Diff/Undo Culture
patterns.description: Git stash create approach, every edit is a commit, every session is a branch

patterns.name: Worktree Manager
patterns.description: WorktreeManager with session-per-worktree model, stats polling, managed sessions tracking

patterns.name: Checkpoints
patterns.description: Resumable agent/session management with checkpoint/restore

patterns.name: Codebase Indexing
patterns.description: Semantic code indexing plus context condensing for large repos

patterns.name: Custom Modes
patterns.description: Custom modes with sticky models, file/path restrictions, mode visibility
